appraisal_events.evidence: « mon amie était venue … habiter à Paris sous le même toit que moi … chaque soir … elle glissait dans ma bouche sa langue »; routine matinale partagée et sifflement entendu depuis la pièce voisine.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narration underlines Albertine’s cohabitation and regular intimacy with the narrator, placing her at the center of his most privileged space and associated with a relief of past sufferings.

status_effects.explanation: She is fully included in the narrator’s intimate space (cohabitation, evening and morning rituals), which raises her local relational position.
